title: Enhanced Anvils
description: Allows you to use colors / fonts and set lore when renaming items in an anvil.
body:
Enhanced Anvils changes the vanilla anvil screen to add extra buttons.

-   16 colored buttons which correspond to each [**color code**](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Formatting_codes#Color_codes) Minecraft supports
-   6 buttons corresponding to each [**formatting code**](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Formatting_codes#Formatting_codes) allowing you to make obfuscated, bold, strikethrough, underlined, italic or reset the formatting of text
-   4 custom buttons corresponding to each [Font](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Font#Java_Edition) in the Minecraft Java edition
-   3 custom lore buttons allowing which turn the current text into lore (up to 3 different lore lines)

Each of the buttons inserts the formatting code at the current cursor position in the edit box. (or at the start if using the font or lore buttons)

These buttons allows users to use colors / fonts / lore when naming items.

The lore feature is mostly untested, please report any problems with the feature on the issue tracker.
